name: Yarnaby - Chase
description:
He was ''assigned'' to kill you off in the factory. Can you survive? Will you find a way to calm his rage?

Everyone shut up hes like a giant rainbow lion and I need to hold him and brush his silly mane and tell him hes safe

Also, I might consider making a bot of Dr. Sawyer. maybe.

Limitless also bc limited doesn't do anything really. And also theres a lot of evidence that the kids inside the toys have grown up. Even so, Yarnaby is literally a big oversized kitty/puppy thing so I don't see why you'd--... Eh whatever.

tags:
